diagrams.title: Interval Scheduling Timeline
diagrams.description: Shows how intervals are selected based on earliest finish time
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how greedy selects non-overlapping intervals by earliest finish time, leaving maximum room for subsequent selections

diagrams.title: Fractional Knapsack Greedy Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step filling of knapsack with items sorted by value/weight ratio
elements: Items as blocks with ratio labels
diagrams.purpose: Understand how items are selected in order of value-to-weight ratio, taking fractions of the last item to maximize value

diagrams.title: Greedy vs DP Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Comparison of when to use greedy vs dynamic programming
elements: No → Dynamic Programming (0/1 Knapsack, Weighted Scheduling)
diagrams.purpose: Help decide which algorithmic paradigm to apply based on problem properties
